meanings.definition: make ridges into by pinching together
make off with belongings of others
irritate as if by a nip, pinch, or tear
examples: smooth surfaces can vellicate the teeth
the pain is as if sharp points pinch your back

meanings.definition: sounding as if the nose were pinched
very thin especially from disease or hunger or cold
examples: a nightmare population of gaunt men and skeletal boys
kept life in his wasted frame only by grim concentration

meanings.definition: not having enough money to pay for necessities

examples: her pinched toes in her pointed shoes were killing her
